questions.subject: History
questions.prompt: The UNESCO Memory of the World International Register includes diverse forms of documentary heritage. Which of the following Indian entries represents a political or administrative archive rather than a religious or literary text?

options.text: Archives of the Dutch East India Company

questions.explanation: While most Indian entries are ancient manuscripts or religious texts (like the Rigveda or Shāntinātha Charitra), the 'Archives of the Dutch East India Company' (2013) and the 'First Summit Meeting of the Non-Aligned Movement Archives' (2023) represent administrative and political documentary heritage.
questions.takeaway: The Memory of the World Register is not limited to ancient manuscripts; it includes significant modern administrative and political archives.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: Previous entries from India in UNESCO Memory of the World Register: ... Archives of the Dutch East India Company (2013); First Summit Meeting of the Non-Aligned Movement Archives (2023).
